$comment: Atlas Search index mapping for the product.search_index collection. Registered with the M0 cluster via the existing .github/workflows/atlas-search-mapping-drift.yml workflow (enforces the 3-index M0 budget per ADR-0006). NOTE: the runtime read path in P7 product-service uses a regex+aggregate against product.search_index rather than $search, per docs/research/phase-7-product-service.md D11 — the 10K queries / 7-day rolling quota on M0 makes burning into $search from a public faceted-search endpoint risky at launch. Swap the read path to $search post-M10 tier upgrade per docs/runbooks/scaling-up.md; this mapping registration becomes load-bearing then.
name: product_search
